message:
refactor(core,mvcc): extract reconcile_xattr_block_after_remove and read_block_version helper methods

ffs-core:
- Extracted reconcile_xattr_block_after_remove() (76 lines) from inline
  code in ext4_removexattr(), cleanly handling the three xattr block
  mutation cases (empty block removal, COW for shared blocks, in-place
  update). Reduces nesting depth and improves readability of the xattr
  removal path.

ffs-mvcc persist:
- Extracted read_block_version() helper (58 lines) from the inner loop
  of load_checkpoint(), encapsulating per-block version reading,
  decompression, and metadata restoration
- Dedup policy is now cached once before the loop instead of being
  queried per-version, avoiding redundant lookups during checkpoint load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
